title: ConversationObject
description: AIChatLog conversation transport protocol. v1 sends full payload; v2 adds conditional sync (check/delta/full modes).

version.description: Protocol version. v1: always full payload with messages required. v2: conditional sync with sync_mode.

sync_mode.description: v2 only. 'full': send all messages. 'delta': send messages from delta_from_seq onward. 'check': metadata only, no messages.

session_id.description: Unique conversation identifier from the source tool.

title.description: Conversation title. Typically derived from the first user message.

project.description: Project name (typically the working directory basename).

project_path.description: Full path to the project directory.

model.description: AI model used in the conversation.

word_count.description: Total word count across all messages.

content_hash.description: Hash of message contents for change detection. Used by the server to detect updates vs duplicates.

has_code.description: v2 only. Whether any message contains code blocks (triple backticks). Plugin computes this to avoid server-side duplication.

delta_from_seq.description: v2 delta mode only. Messages in the payload start at this seq number. Server deletes messages with seq >= this value and inserts the new ones.

messages.description: Ordered list of conversation messages. Required for v1 and v2 full/delta modes. Omitted in v2 check mode.

content.description: Full message content (may include markdown, code blocks, etc.).

time_str.description: Message timestamp as a display string (e.g. '14:30' or '14:30:22').

is_context.description: If true, this message is injected context (e.g. file contents), not a real conversation turn.

seq.description: Zero-based sequence number defining message order.
